login.brandTagline: Do For Employee · Do For Enterprise · Do For Empowerment
login.visionText: Do For E — an open manifesto. dofe is more than an AI system: it's an execution engine built for Employees, Enterprises, and Empowerment.
login.missionText: Warm like a dolphin, reliable as iron. We connect silos, build intelligent ecosystems, and make every execution a step toward excellence.

eWords.label: For Employees
eWords.desc: Always for the people — empower every team member

eWords.label: For Enterprise
eWords.desc: Think big — drive intelligent transformation at scale

eWords.label: For Empowerment
eWords.desc: Beyond tools — extend and amplify human capability

eWords.label: For Execution
eWords.desc: One prompt starts everything — turn ideas into action instantly

eWords.label: For Efficiency
eWords.desc: Reclaim every wasted minute — max out your throughput

eWords.label: For Excellence
eWords.desc: Never just ship it — AI-standardized execution pursues quality

eWords.label: For Ecosystem
eWords.desc: Break down silos — build a collaborative digital nervous system

eWords.label: For Evolution
eWords.desc: Ignite continuous organizational evolution — future-ready by design

eWords.label: For Escort
eWords.desc: Guard every transaction and asset — your AI security escort around the clock
